name: Gumroad Creator Commerce API
what_it_does: Gumroad API for digital product sales and creator commerce. Enables programmatic access to product listings, sales data, customer records, and subscription management. Used by creators, indie hackers, and solopreneurs selling digital products like ebooks, courses, and software.
use_cases: Querying Gumroad sales data and revenue analytics from creator business agents
Retrieving customer purchase records and subscription status from CRM agents
Managing product listings and pricing from content monetization agents
Generating sales reports and customer cohort analysis from business intelligence agents
not_for: Enterprise e-commerce at scale (optimized for indie creators)
best_when: A creator or indie hacker using Gumroad wants AI agents to query sales data, customer records, and product performance — automating creator business reporting.
avoid_when: You need advanced e-commerce features or high-volume transaction processing. Also: FINANCIAL RISK — autonomous product pricing or refund issuance requires human review.

auth.notes: Gumroad OAuth 2.0 for user-authorized access. API access key available in account settings. Rate limited per key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Gumroad free plan: 10% transaction fee; API access included
pricing.paid_tiers: Gumroad charges transaction fees on sales
pricing.notes: Gumroad takes a percentage of each sale. API access is included with Gumroad account.

performance.rate_limits: Gumroad API: rate limited; specific limits not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Sales data includes customer payment records and PII
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Gumroad API is older and documentation is limited
Refund and product modifications require creator review
Customer data includes purchase history — handle per privacy laws
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Creator sales data and customer PII. PCI-DSS for payment data. Customer purchase records require privacy compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Creator sales and customer data. Payment records are PCI-DSS sensitive. Customer PII requires privacy compliance.
